## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible outcome.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or validation commands are included below.
- [ ] Docs impact is described, or this change has no docs impact.
- [ ] Schema impact is described, or this change has no schema impact.
- [ ] CLI surface impact is described, or this change has no CLI impact.
- [ ] Example bundle updated, or no example update is needed.
- [ ] Release note needed, or no release note is needed.

## Validation

Paste the commands run and their results.
